Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWTABELAPRECO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &TabSts = nullvalue(&TabSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Cadastro de Tabela de Preços' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If &TabDtaIni.IsEmpty() &TabDtaIni = Serverdate() EndIF EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount TabSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' &Update.Link = TabelaPreco.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, TabCod) &Delete = !'' &Delete.Link = TabelaPreco.Link(TrnMode.Delete, EmpCod, TabCod) &grpTabela.Clear() &grpTabela.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &grpTabela.AddItem(1, 'Produtos') &grpTabela.AddItem(2, 'Produtos - Multiplos') &grpTabela.AddItem(3, 'Imprimir') &grpTabela.AddItem(4, 'Congelar') &grpTabela.AddItem(5, 'Importar') &grpTabela.AddItem(6, 'Catálogos') If (TabSts <> StatusTabela.Inativa) &grpTabela.AddItem(7, 'Clonar') Endif &grpTabela.AddItem(8, 'Alterar Preços') &grpTabela.AddItem(9, 'Aplicar em Pedidos') &grpTabela.AddItem(10, 'Log.Alteração') Do Case Case TabSts = StatusTabela.NormalAtiva TabSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case TabSts = StatusTabela.Inativa TabSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case TabSts = StatusTabela.Promocao TabSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case TabSts = StatusTabela.EmConstrucao TabSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Otherwise TabSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &AuxTabCod = TabCod if TabIsAllAre = true &Areas = 'TODAS' Else do 'getAreas' Endif if TabIsAllUfe = true &Ufs = 'TODAS' Else do 'getUFs' EndIf EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &grpTabela.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &grpTabela = 1 Do 'Do ProdutosTabela' Case &grpTabela = 2 Do 'Do ProdutoMultiplo' Case &grpTabela = 3 Do 'Do ImprimirTabela' Case &grpTabela = 4 Do 'Do CongelaTabela' Case &grpTabela = 5 Do 'Do ImportarXls' Case &grpTabela = 6 Do 'Do catalogos' Case &grpTabela = 7 Do 'Do Clonar' Case &grpTabela = 8 Do 'Do Alterapreco' Case &grpTabela = 9 Do 'Do AplicarEmPedidos' Case &grpTabela = 10 Do 'Do LogAlteracao' EndCase &grpTabela = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event LogAlteracao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wwLogRegistrosIndividual.Create(&LogErpRegKey, 'TABELAPRECO') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TabelaPreco.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(TabCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoPrecosEspeciais' wpCombinado.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TabNom1.Visible = False &TabIsAllAre1.Visible = False &TabIsAllUfe1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABNOM' &TabNom1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABISALLARE' &TabIsAllAre1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABISALLUFE' &TabIsAllUfe1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TabNom2.Visible = False &TabIsAllAre2.Visible = False &TabIsAllUfe2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABNOM' &TabNom2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABISALLARE' &TabIsAllAre2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABISALLUFE' &TabIsAllUfe2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TabNom3.Visible = False &TabIsAllAre3.Visible = False &TabIsAllUfe3.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABNOM' &TabNom3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABISALLARE' &TabIsAllAre3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABISALLUFE' &TabIsAllUfe3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 0 &TabNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 0 &TabNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ProdutosTabela' wpAdicionaProdutoTabela.Call('', 0, TabCod, TabUltAlt, false) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ProdutoMultiplo' wwPlanilhaCusto_TabAcrescimo.Link(TabCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ImprimirTabela' wpImprimirTabela.Popup(TabCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CongelaTabela' wpCongelaTabela.Link(EmpCod, TabCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ImportarXls' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpImportarTabelaPreco.Call(EmpCod, TabCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do catalogos' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWCatalogo.Call(TabCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Clonar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPClonarTabela.Call(EmpCod, TabCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Alterapreco' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPAlteraPreco.Call(EmpCod, TabCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AplicarEmPedidos' wpAplicarModificacoes.Popup(EmpCod, TabCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do LogAlteracao' &LogErpRegKey = trim(TabCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LogAlteracao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"TABDTAINI" &TabDtaIni.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"TABCOD" &TabCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"TABSTS" &TabSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Endif EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &TabNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABISALLARE' &TabIsAllAre1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABISALLUFE' &TabIsAllUfe1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Endif EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"TABDTAINI", "", not &TabDtaIni.IsEmpty(), 0, &TabDtaIni.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"TABCOD", "", not &TabCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &TabCod, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"TABSTS", "", not &TabSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &TabSts, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABNOM' AND not &TabNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabNom1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABISALLARE' AND not &TabIsAllAre1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabIsAllAre1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABISALLUFE' AND not &TabIsAllUfe1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabIsAllUfe1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABNOM' AND not &TabNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabNom2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABISALLARE' AND not &TabIsAllAre2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabIsAllAre2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABISALLUFE' AND not &TabIsAllUfe2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabIsAllUfe2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABNOM' AND not &TabNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabNom3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABISALLARE' AND not &TabIsAllAre3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabIsAllAre3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABISALLUFE' AND not &TabIsAllUfe3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabIsAllUfe3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"TabelaPreco" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'getUFs' &Ufs = '' &Count = 0 For Each ORder EmpCod, TabCod, TabUfeCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where TabCod = &AuxTabCod if &Count > 0 &Ufs += ', ' Endif &Count += 1 &Ufs += trim(TabUfeCod) EndFor EndSub Sub 'getAreas' &Areas = '' &Count = 0 For Each ORder EmpCod, TabCod, TabAreCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where TabCod = &AuxTabCod if &Count > 0 &Areas += ', ' Endif &Count += 1 &Areas += trim(str(TabAreCod)) EndFor EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
